The incident-window crossed' templates; Cluster F (4 overlaps) - D1 marketing/newsletter opener template inherited from C13 'subscriber-shipment newsletter rolled onto the household-subscriber inbox from' + 'covering the upcoming spring-quarter shipment cycle on the household-side' templates; Cluster G (24 overlaps - LARGEST cluster) - D2 generic-daily-briefing template inherited near-verbatim from C13 D2 outdoor-patio briefing 'trailing/forward-twelve-hour household-coordination rollup pattern threads' + 'On the household-side personal-calendar surface accessed through the X wall-mounted display, zero priority-personal-appointment slots are showing on the previous-day-and-forward-three-day household-side personal-calendar window through the household-side personal-rollup cadence pattern. lesson_3_proactive_paraphrase_of_recurri.template_d_routine_status_digest_closing: Substituted EXPORT-AND-ACTION-PLAN-ARTIFACT closing framing ('per-pillar check-result CSV-export link onto Trusted-Advisor-side report-export surface plus per-recommendation Action-Plan AWS-Systems-Manager-document attachment-link onto Systems-Manager-runbook surface plus per-account cost-saving-opportunity bookmarks-list link onto Trusted-Advisor-side recommendation-archive surface plus per-organization Trusted-Advisor priority-recommendation Trello-board sync link on platform-engineering-organization Trello-side recommendation-tracking surface') -- CSV-export + AWS-Systems-Manager Action-Plan document attachment + cost-saving-opportunity bookmarks-list + Trello-board priority-recommendation sync rather than C12 PagerDuty 'organization-administrator-side digest delivery-cadence preference summary link plus per-team analytics deep-link onto per-team PagerDuty-side incident-and-postmortem dashboard view' / C11 Cloudflare WAF 'alert-rule trigger cadence flowing into per-zone X notification-routing onto platform-engineering organization-side Slack-plus-email channels' per C14 kickoff guidance (d)
